creator: klm@uidzero.org
text:
Regarding Edwin Groothuis's note from Sun, Apr 15, 2007 at 08:50:12AM +0000:
> Maintainer of security/ftimes,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/111593 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111593
> 
Please note that I submitted an update patch for ftimes 3.8.0 last
night, which contained additional changes beyond this patch. Since
my patch has already been committed, I think it's safe to abort
this PR. The full text of my PR can be found here:

  http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=111584

later,
k
-- 
Klayton Monroe
klm@uidzero.org
Fingerprint = 6D3B 1DBC F426 36E4 7C9A  FA93 9A5D D62D 4D86 DBFC
